newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The most recent event was 1H FY2026 results (revenue NZ$128.2m up 5.3%, net income ~NZ$4.34m flat, margin slipped to 3.4%) reported earlier in the period; no new NZX contract, guidance or order announcement since June 9.

sources.label: Scott Technology - Simply Wall St (1H FY26 results)

verdicts.rankRationale: Industrial automation/robotics scaling fit unchanged since June 8 hold. 1H results were flat-to-soft (margin down to 3.4%), no new order or guidance, -3% day move is no-news drift. Nothing new strengthens or weakens the physical-AI scaling case; hold at #6.
verdicts.bull: Meat-processing/mining-lab/materials-handling automation franchise with real deployed robotics revenue.
verdicts.neutral: Small-cap ($0.13B) automation house growing low single digits; thesis static.
verdicts.bear: Margin compression in 1H, -12% YTD; not a pure AI-scaling play, more legacy industrial automation.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: New automation contract / FY26 order book update
verdicts.primaryRisk: Margin erosion from cost inflation; cyclical capex demand
